name: Honeybadger
description: Monitor Honeybadger error monitoring for application health and incident response compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Honeybadger at https://app.honeybadger.io
2. Go to Profile → Authentication Tokens
3. Copy your API key
4. Base64 encode 'api_key:' (with colon, empty password)
5. Enter the encoded value below

credentialFields.label: Encoded API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'api_key:' (your API key with a colon and empty password). Command: echo -n 'your_api_key:' | base64

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Honeybadger projects are configured for error monitoring

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Verifies Honeybadger uptime checks are configured for availability monitoring
